The '''Moon Lady''' was the primary [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Askaji/Legends|Askaj]]. However, the [[Askajian/Legends|Askajians]] held the moon in such reverence that the Moon Lady was also counted as a [[Deity/Legends|deity]].

{{Deity-stub}}
